OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

So the answer would be "no" - I have not told the recruiter about my bachelor course yet.

I need to answer with "yes" or "no" and then stop, in the format: ANSWER: <one sentence>
